basic_details.job_title: IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Engineer and Project Business Analyst Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar (IIT Bhubaneswar) Project Staff (Website & ERP) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.iitbbs.ac.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Bhubaneswar Project Staff (Website & ERP) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Project Business Analyst (Website / ERP): MBA / BE / B.Tech / MCA or equivalent with a minimum of 55% marks (or equivalent CGPA) from a recognized university. Minimum 1 year of post-qualification experience as a Business Analyst / Functional Analyst or equivalent role. Project Engineer-I (Website / ERP): BE / B.Tech / MCA / MSc (CS / IT) or equivalent with a minimum of 55% marks (or equivalent CGPA) from a recognized university. Minimum 1 year of relevant post-qualification experience in web or enterprise application development. Project Engineer-II (Website & ERP): BE / B.Tech / MCA / MSc (CS / IT) or equivalent with a minimum of 55% marks (or equivalent CGPA) from a recognized university.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT BHU Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT BHU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT BHU Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT BHU Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Business Analyst (Website / ERP): MBA / BE / B.Tech / MCA or equivalent with a minimum of 55% marks (or equivalent CGPA) from a recognized university. Minimum 1 year of post-qualification experience as a Business Analyst / Functional Analyst or equivalent role. Project Engineer-I (Website / ERP): BE / B.Tech / MCA / MSc (CS / IT) or equivalent with a minimum of 55% marks (or equivalent CGPA) from a recognized university. Minimum 1 year of relevant post-qualification experience in web or enterprise application development. Project Engineer-II (Website & ERP): BE / B.Tech / MCA / MSc (CS / IT) or equivalent with a minimum of 55% marks (or equivalent CGPA) from a recognized university.

rows.event: Last Date for receipt of applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT BHU Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT BHU to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT BHU Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIT BHU Project Staff (Website & ERP) posts is 16th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Staff at IIT BHU?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Project Staff (Website & ERP) positions at IIT BHU. These are distributed across different roles like Project Business Analyst and Project Engineer.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications include MBA, BE/B.Tech, MCA, or MSc (CS/IT) with a minimum of 55% marks from a recognized university. Specific experience requirements vary by post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Staff positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 42,000 to Rs. 49,000 per month, depending on the specific post and qualifications. Project Business Analyst and Project Engineer-I receive ₹ 49,000, while Project Engineer-II receives ₹ 42,000.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for IIT BHU recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Staff roles?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves an Interview, Written Test, and Technical Assessment. Candidates will be evaluated based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from outside Uttar Pradesh apply?
faq.answer: Yes, the recruitment is open to eligible candidates regardless of their current location, provided they meet the specified educational and experience criteria.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contract basis. This means the employment is for a fixed duration as specified by the institute.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. How should I apply for the IIT BHU Project Staff posts?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website or the provided 'Apply Online' link. Ensure all details are accurate and upload necessary documents.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the IIT BHU Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIT BHU Project Staff (Website & ERP) posts is 16th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.
